## 🎥 ViBe Tutorial - My Learning Journey at VLED Lab

During my Vinternship at VLED Lab, I completed the ViBe MERN tutorial and worked on real-world case studies.

### 🚀 What I Learned

- MERN Stack basics
- Frontend-Backend integration
- Real project thinking
- Confidence in development

### 💡 Why This Vlog?

This vlog is about sharing my journey from confusion to clarity.  
I hope it motivates other students to start building.
